scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "PRODUCT,CUSTOMER,ORDER,PAYMENT,GATEWAY" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue" "cd product-service && npm start" "cd customer-service && npm start" "cd order-service && npm start" "cd payment-service && npm start" "cd api-gateway && npm start"
scripts.install:all: cd product-service && npm install && cd ../customer-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install
